positive: A highly detailed, minimalist geometric mandala design featuring celestial bodies and stylized botanical elements. The core composition is a perfect central symmetrical knotwork pattern. Use negative space to create striking contrast against a deep midnight blue or cosmic black background. The style should resemble sophisticated linocut or negative-space woodblock print art, utilizing only clean black line work and white fills. The design must be isolated, perfect for repeating textile pattern, with clear, bold silhouettes and clean edges, evoking a sense of mystical symmetry and cosmic wonder. Studio lighting, vector art quality, ultra detailed, printable.
